chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.D- 961 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 01.10.2020 None present. = This constitutional petition is called for hearing. None present on behalf of the petitioner. No intimation received. On the last date of hearing learned counsel for the petitioner was put on notice to satisfy the Court with regard to maintainability of this petition but today, as observed above, none has appeared on behalf of the petitioner, which shows that either the purpose for which instant petition was filed has been served or the petitioner has lost his interest in this petition, which is accordingly dismissed in non-prosecution alongwith pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE S
